cursor.desc: Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call to list items in the next page. Search for specific roles by providing the optional `role_ids` argument, and feel free to bring your own pagination with `limit` and `cursor`.

entity_ids.desc: The entities for which the roles apply

limit.desc: The maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 - 200 both inclusive. Search for specific roles by providing the optional `role_ids` argument, and feel free to bring your own pagination with `limit` and `cursor`.

role_ids.desc: collection of role ids to scope results by. Search for specific roles by providing the optional `role_ids` argument, and feel free to bring your own pagination with `limit` and `cursor`.

sort_dir.desc: Sort direction. Default is descending on date\_create, can be either ASC or DESC

desc: Lists assignments for all roles across entities. Options to scope results by any combination of roles or entities

errors.feature_not_enabled: This API is currently not enabled.
errors.invalid_actor: This API is only enabled for the Admins/Owners.
errors.invalid_role_id: One or more role IDs could not be validated.
